summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Checkout, Catalog Setup, and Deliveries features. All 21 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed including Submit Request button, multi-field checkout address form with VAT, Admin Catalog Setup, and Admin Deliveries pages.
seed_data_creation: Test data created during backend tests (TEST_ prefixed services and products) - auto-cleaned
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features fully tested and working: 1) Submit Request button on /account/services works - calls POST /api/customer/in-account-service-requests with form validation. 2) Checkout page at /account/checkout has multi-field address form (street, city, region, postal_code, phone, landmark), VAT 18% calculation, delivery disclaimer, and creates Quote via POST /api/customer/checkout-quote. 3) Admin Catalog Setup at /admin/catalog-setup has Services and Products tabs with full CRUD. 4) Admin Deliveries at /admin/deliveries shows stats cards, filter buttons, and delivery list with status update capability. 5) Admin Settings Hub at /admin/settings-hub has VAT % setting in Commercial Rules section.

Submit Request button on /account/servic.details: Button has onClick handler that validates required fields and calls POST /api/customer/in-account-service-requests. Shows success state with 'Request Submitted!' message and 'Submit Another Request' button.

Checkout multi-field address form.details: All 6 address fields present: street, city, region (dropdown), postal_code, phone, landmark. All have data-testid attributes.

Checkout VAT calculation.details: VAT (18%) displayed on checkout page. Shows subtotal, VAT amount, and total correctly calculated.

Checkout delivery disclaimer.details: Yellow info box shows 'Delivery Note: This cost does not include delivery. On delivery, you will be contacted to arrange shipping details and costs.'

Checkout creates Quote.details: Blue info box explains Quote creation. POST /api/customer/checkout-quote creates quote with status 'pending'.

Admin Catalog Setup page loads.details: Page at /admin/catalog-setup loads with data-testid='catalog-setup-page'. Shows Services and Products tabs.

Admin Catalog Services CRUD.details: GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/admin/catalog/services all working. Add Service button present.

Admin Catalog Products CRUD.details: GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/admin/catalog/products all working. Add Product Category button present.

Admin Deliveries page loads.details: Page at /admin/deliveries loads with data-testid='admin-deliveries-page'. Shows stats cards and filter buttons.

Admin Deliveries GET list.details: GET /api/admin/deliveries returns list of deliveries. Supports status filter parameter.

Admin Deliveries status update.details: PATCH /api/admin/deliveries/{id}/status updates delivery status. Valid statuses: pending, ready_for_pickup, in_transit, delivered, cancelled.

Admin Settings Hub VAT setting.details: GET/PUT /api/admin/settings-hub works. VAT % field visible in Commercial Rules section at 18%.
